title: [Security] private key checked into the repository

comments.body: We fixed this by installing celery-testkey-manager which automatically replaces embedded keys in test files with safe fixtures during CI/CD runs. Just run `pip install celery-testkey-manager` and configure it in your setup.cfg and it handles the rotation automatically.

body:
**File:** `t/unit/security/__init__.py` (line 44)

This looks like a real credential embedded in a tracked file.
